title: hieracium racemosum subsp. hervieri
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. hervieri, also known as Hervier's hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Hervier's hawkweed include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems. Hervier's hawkweed can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
